reviews.comment:
Año 2017 , ésta estación está incomunicada , no tiene WiFi , no hay un teléfono público y en esa zona no hay señal de celular..

(Translated by Google)
In 2017, this station was cut off, it had no WiFi, no public phone, and no cell phone signal in the area.

reviews.comment:
Muy pequeño el shop, muy sucio el baño nunca lo encontré limpio y es sólo uno al ser sobre una ruta la cola hay que hacerla afuera y no tiene techito

(Translated by Google)
The shop is very small, the bathroom is very dirty (I never found it clean) and there's only one. Since it's on a highway, you have to queue outside and there's no roof.
